name: Chilled Sonoma Tomato Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 ripe tomatoes, blanched, peeled and seeded
1 small jalapeno pepper, cored, seeded and chopped fine
1 Serrano pepper, cored, seeded and chopped fine
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
1/4 cup chopped mixed fresh herbs (Italian parsley, chives, cilantro, and tarragon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes, cucumbers, bell peppers, celery, and onion into 1-inch pieces.
Place in a stainless-steel bowl along with jalapeno and Serrano chilies.
Add tomato juice, vinegar, and olive oil. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
Cover and refrigerate overnight, stirring occasionally.
2. Pulse the mixture until the vegetables are finely chopped but still have some texture.
Return to a bowl, add the chopped herbs, and correct the seasonings to taste.
Chill and serve in ice-cold bowls.
